name: Synco X-Talk X1 Wireless Intercom System Single Ear Headset
description: The Synco X-Talk X1 is a full-duplex wireless headset for use with the X-Talk intercom system engineered to provide clear communication in a comfortable true-wireless design with no bodypack or hub required.

features.Key Features:: Easy-to-Use Low-Power 2.4 GHz Headset | 1 Single-Ear Headset, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use as Master or Remote | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) | Expandable to 18 Headsets with Groups | Comfortable Padded Ear Cushion | 1148' Operating Range | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Rechargeable Battery and Cable
features.What's in the box?: Synco X-Talk X1 Wireless Intercom Single-Ear Headset (2.4 GHz) | Rechargeable Battery | One-Ear Foam Cushion | Mic Windsreen | USB Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
